title: Crash when creating view with `HAVING`
description:
The following test case crashed the monetdb server.

**To Reproduce**

```sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0 CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT, PRIMARY KEY(c0)); 
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT '' FROM t0 HAVING ((t0.c0 BETWEEN t0.c0 AND t0.c0)); -- unexpected end of file
```

**Expected behavior**
No crash.

**Screenshots**

poc: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0 CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT, PRIMARY KEY(c0));
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT '' FROM t0 HAVING ((t0.c0 BETWEEN t0.c0 AND t0.c0));
key_bug_features: Creating view with HAVING clause causes server crash
bug_features_seed: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1 CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(50), c3 DATE, PRIMARY KEY(c1));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 HAVING (c1 IS NOT NULL AND c2 LIKE '%test%');
CREATE VIEW v2 AS SELECT c1 FROM t1 HAVING (c1 BETWEEN 1 AND 1);
